subcodes.first_line: The servant was present before the Wronged One with a book in hand, adorned with the mention and praise of God, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عبد حاضر نزد مظلوم حاضر مع کتابی در دست و مزین بود بذکر و ثنای حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
